summary: Tested 4 bug fixes for Tile Station e-commerce: (1) Spec Formatting - code logic verified correct for suitability and slip_rating formatting, (2) Collection Card Discount Badge - code logic verified for trade users showing only trade discount for non-sale collections, (3) Sale Ribbon Breakdown - verified guaranteed-sum math in code, (4) Finish Selector - VERIFIED WORKING on Ridgeway Matt collection with single finish. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working for finish selector and sale ribbon.

issues: React warning: 'Received %s for a non-boolean attribute' - minor console warning, not critical

critical_code_review_comments: Bug #1 (Spec Formatting): Code correctly implements suitability formatting with split('-').map(w => w.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + w.slice(1)).join(' & ') in CollectionDetailPage.js:2308 and TileDetailPage.js:855
Bug #1 (Spec Formatting): Code correctly implements slip_rating.toUpperCase() in CollectionDetailPage.js:2314 and TileDetailPage.js:843
Bug #2 (Collection Card Discount Badge): Code correctly returns ONLY productTradeDiscount for non-sale trade users (line 462) instead of additive baseDiscount + productTradeDiscount
Bug #2 (Collection Card Discount Badge): Code correctly uses compound formula for sale+trade: Math.round((1 - (1-sale/100)*(1-trade/100)) * 100) at line 459
Bug #3 (Sale Ribbon Breakdown): Code correctly implements guaranteed-sum math where saleContrib = Math.max(0, displayTotalOff - tradeContrib - volumeContrib) ensuring breakdown always sums to total
Bug #3 (Sale Ribbon Breakdown): Credit Back is correctly separated from price discounts with different styling (green italic text after Total)
Bug #4 (Finish Selector): Code correctly uses hasFinishes (line 325-330) instead of hasMultipleFinishes for showing finish selector
Bug #4 (Finish Selector): Verified on Ridgeway Matt collection - finish selector visible with single 'Matt' finish, auto-selected with amber styling
test_credentials: Admin: admin@test.com / admin123 (API login works, frontend login shows 'Invalid email or password' - may need different endpoint)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing collections (Ridgeway Matt, Tuscania Polished)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 bug fixes verified: (1) Spec formatting code logic correct but preview data may not have suitability/slip_rating populated - verify on production, (2) Collection card discount badge logic correct - non-sale trade users see only trade discount, (3) Sale ribbon breakdown uses guaranteed-sum math, (4) Finish selector now shows for single-finish collections like Ridgeway Matt. Sale ribbon tested on Tuscania Polished 60x120cm which has sale_active=True and was_price=39.99. Trade user testing limited due to frontend login issue.

frontend_tests.finish_selector_single_finish: PASS - Ridgeway Matt shows Finish: Matt with Matt button auto-selected (amber styling)
frontend_tests.sale_ribbon_display: PASS - Tuscania Polished 60x120cm shows WAS £39.99 NOW £33.99 SAVE £6.00 15% OFF
frontend_tests.console_errors_listing_page: PASS - Only minor React warning, no critical errors

bug_1_spec_formatting.details: Suitability and Slip Rating formatting code is correct. Preview data may not have these fields populated - verify on production.

bug_2_collection_card_discount_badge.details: discountPct calculation in TileCollectionsPage.js correctly returns only productTradeDiscount for non-sale trade users (not additive)

bug_3_sale_ribbon_breakdown.details: Guaranteed-sum math implemented: saleContrib = Math.max(0, displayTotalOff - tradeContrib - volumeContrib). Credit Back separated with green italic styling.

bug_4_finish_selector_missing.details: Finish selector now shows on Ridgeway Matt (single finish collection). hasFinishes check added alongside hasMultipleFinishes.
